strategy_summary: The strategy is to use a format string vulnerability in the printf call to overwrite the value of x with 4, which will trigger the execution of /bin/sh. Since the binary has a stack canary and NX, we need to carefully craft our payload to avoid overwriting the canary or executing code on the stack. We will use the fmtstr_payload function from pwntools to create the payload, targeting the address of x. We also need to measure the offset to control the argument for the format string.
